creator: yaldabaoth.geo@yahoo.com
text:
The problem remains present in 4.1.
The fix is identical.
Just wanted to be sure this problem was kept alive, as it makes
reinstallation more difficult than it needs to be.
In addition, I have found several other users with similarly peculiar
disk drives (Maxtor makes at least one drive exhibiting this problem).
Thus I am not alone in having this problem.
